title: canangium monospermum
intro: Canangium monospermum, also known as the yellow balsa tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Canangium monospermum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to make herbal teas or applied topically to the affected area.
